name: Peptide Complex
description: A signal peptide that communicates with skin cells to boost collagen and elastin production.
scientificSummary: Peptides are short chains of amino acids that serve as messengers, signaling fibroblasts to ramp up collagen synthesis.
mechanismOfAction: Mimics collagen breakdown fragments to trigger a wound-healing response, accelerating collagen and elastin production.

seo.title: Peptide Complex - Collagen Boosting Peptides | Dew Theory
seo.description: Explore how signal peptides like Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1 firm skin and reduce the appearance of wrinkles.
